added.description: Actionable error messages when attempting to parse passphrase-encrypted PEM private keys
Extensive README updates covering secure random IVs, IV persistence, GCM mode, and platform compliance notes
Battle tests for CBC IV persistence and GCM IV enforcement

changed.description: Applied dart format with 120 line length across modified files

fixed.description: Fix AES-GCM example to correctly use a 12-byte IV instead of 16-byte

security.description: Enforce correct IV usage in GCM examples and clarify IV persistence in documentation to prevent nonce-reuse vulnerabilities
